ANTCGLNT_DSCHRG_CD ANTCGLNT_DSCHRG_CD O0110H4C Other: IV - Anticoagulation (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received anticoagulant IV medications in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1001 INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_ADMSN_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_ADMSN_CD O0110H10A Other: IV - Other (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received other IV medications days one through three (on admission) of
